name: dsk
description: Design System Kernel (DSK): turns a company's declared design system source into a stable snapshot — structured data plus rendered screenshots — that the agent reads to generate on-brand slide decks via chat. Scope today: PowerPoint as source, Claude Design as host. The snapshot is captured once and reused; layouts, examples, and content types stay consistent across sessions and users. DSK is designed vendor-neutral and engine-pluggable; additional source engines (Keynote, Google Slides, Figma, design tokens) and other folder-based hosts are possible future extensions, not currently implemented.
